name: blooming-happiness
description: Luxury flower boutique - full-stack monorepo (frontend + backend)

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n FRONTEND,BACKEND -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend"
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix frontend && npm run lint --prefix backend
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix --prefix frontend && npm run lint:fix --prefix backend
scripts.format: npm run format --prefix frontend && npm run format --prefix backend
